translation_findings.jp: OCR contains chapter intro prose + 「ここに注目して読もう！」 bullets + a 分野/大分類 syllabus mapping table; translated/structured emits only the chapter entity (法務).
translation_findings.issue: Intro bullets and syllabus mapping table not promoted to entities. Likely intentional (chapter cover page convention). Non release-blocking.
translation_findings.recommended_fix: Confirm chapter-cover scope rule in product spec; no action if intentional.
